title: Trading Skills for Beginners – Article Landing Page

requirements.text: Create a professional article landing page titled 'Trading Skills for Beginners' with three main content sections: (1) Basics of Trading – explaining fundamental concepts like assets, markets, and buy/sell mechanics; (2) Background of Trading – a brief history and evolution of trading markets; (3) How to Start Trading – a step-by-step beginner guide covering account setup, choosing a broker, risk management, and making first trades.

quotes: article title : trading skills for beginners

acceptanceCriteria: Page displays a prominent hero section with the article title 'Trading Skills for Beginners'
Three clearly labeled content sections are present: Basics of Trading, Background of Trading, How to Start Trading
Each section contains substantive, readable content appropriate for beginners
Page includes a sticky table of contents or section navigation for easy scrolling
Page uses semantic HTML (h1, h2, h3, article, section tags) for SEO-friendliness
Meta title and description are set appropriately for the article topic

requirements.text: Apply a bold, modern financial/editorial visual theme to the landing page using a dark charcoal and gold color palette, strong typography with a serif headline font and clean sans-serif body font, and a structured editorial layout with clear visual hierarchy. The design should feel credible and professional, suitable for a financial education article.
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses dark charcoal backgrounds with gold/amber accents consistently throughout
Headline font is a serif typeface; body text uses a readable sans-serif font
Visual hierarchy is clear — headings stand out from body text
Layout is clean, editorial, and responsive across desktop and mobile screen sizes
Call-to-action or share elements (if present) match the overall theme

requirements.text: Add a hero banner image depicting a financial trading theme — a stylized stock chart or market candlestick pattern — rendered as a static asset and displayed as the article hero background.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero banner image is displayed at the top of the article page as a full-width or wide background
Image file is served from frontend/public/assets/generated
Image is visually consistent with the dark charcoal and gold theme

constraints: All content must be stored and rendered on the frontend only — no backend persistence needed for static article content
Use semantic HTML elements for SEO compatibility
nonGoals: Actual Google SEO ranking improvements (this is outside the scope of the application)
Real-time market data or live trading integrations
Multiple articles or a full blog CMS

required: Stylized financial trading hero banner with candlestick charts and glowing gold lines on a dark charcoal background, wide landscape composition (trading-hero.dim_1200x500.png)
